query:
SELECT 
  scheduledAt,
  startedAt,
  completedAt,
  status,
  errorMessage,
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, startedAt, completedAt) AS durationMins
FROM pipelineRuns
ORDER BY scheduledAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
